claims.claim: 11th from Lagna Pada occupied or aspected by a planet — native will be happy and rich
Benefic related to 11th from Lagna Pada — wealth through virtuous means
Malefic related to 11th from Lagna Pada — wealth through questionable means
Both benefic and malefic related to 11th from Lagna Pada — wealth through both means
Planet in exaltation or own sign related to 11th from Lagna Pada — plenty of gains and happiness
12th from Lagna Pada unaspected while 11th is aspected — gains will be uninterrupted
Quantum of gains proportional to number of planets in or aspecting 11th from Lagna Pada
Argala for the 11th from Lagna Pada — more gains; benefic Argala brings still more
Benefic in exaltation causing Argala for 11th — gains increase in ascending order
Modifier: 12th from Pada must be simultaneously free from malefic association for gains
12th from Lagna Pada aspected by both benefics and malefics — abundant earnings but plenty of expenses
Benefic aspecting 12th from Lagna Pada — expenses through fair means
Malefic aspecting 12th from Lagna Pada — expenses through unfair means
Sun, Venus, Rahu conjunct Lagna Pada — loss of wealth through the king
Moon aspecting Sun-Venus-Rahu conjunct Lagna Pada — specifically causes more losses
Mercury in 12th from Lagna Pada with or aspected by benefic — expenses through paternal relatives
Malefic Mercury (so related) in 12th from Lagna Pada — loss of wealth through disputes
Jupiter in 12th from Lagna Pada, aspected by others — expenses through taxes on one's own
Saturn in 12th from Lagna Pada along with Mars, aspected by others — expenses through co-born
Rahu or Ketu in 7th from Lagna Pada — stomachial disorders or trouble by fire
Ketu in 7th from Lagna Pada with aspect or conjunction of malefic — native will be adventurous
Ketu in 7th from Lagna Pada with malefic — prematurely grey hair and big male organ
One, two or all three of Jupiter, Venus, Moon in 7th from Lagna Pada — native will be very wealthy
Benefic or malefic exalted in 7th from Lagna Pada — native will be affluent and famous
Mercury, Jupiter, Venus exalted in 2nd from Lagna Pada with strength — native will be rich
Mercury in 2nd from Arudha Lagna — native will lord over the whole country
Venus in 2nd from Lagna Pada — native will be a poet or speaker
Dara Pada in angle or trine from Lagna Pada or both have strong planets — native will be rich and famous in his country
Dara Pada in 6th/8th/12th from Lagna Pada — native will be poor
Lagna Pada and 7th (or angle/trine/upachaya) occupied by strong planet — happiness between husband and wife
Lagna Pada and Dara Pada mutually angular or trinal — amity between couple
Lagna Pada and Dara Pada mutually 6th/8th/12th — enmity between couple
Lagna Pada and Dara Pada mutually angular or 3rd/11th or trinal — native will be a king ruling the earth
